text: Started core-change session: World-class repo hardening
Dogfooded agent-kit into its own repo root: init installed root docs and .agent-kit, project context filled with real evidence, placeholder docs replaced, overrides documented.

decision: Dogfood kit into repo root; hash-aware update; lint/format/coverage gates; CI matrix; changesets; human-first CLI output with --json contract.
risk: Template conflicts will surface here first

notes: Human-first CLI output, --json and --dry-run everywhere, guided init, error boundary
Full gate: json validation, version check, typecheck, lint, format, coverage tests, build, example check, install smoke, studio smoke, npm audit, SBOM, pack dry run.

evidence: CLI-only change; output verified via CLI contract tests.
npm audit clean; SBOM validated; no new dependencies with CVEs; update command uses resolveInside path guards.
DECISIONS.md ADRs 2026-07-02: dogfood root install, hash-aware update semantics, hygiene baseline, human-first CLI output.
Repo audit passes with 63 checks; QUALITY_GATES.md and DOGFOOD.md updated with 2026-07-02 evidence.
npm audit clean; SBOM validated; no new deps with CVEs; update command constrained by resolveInside path guards.
npm run release:check passed: typecheck, lint, format, coverage-gated tests, install smoke, studio smoke, pack dry run.
DECISIONS.md, DOCS.md, SPEC.md, README.md, DOGFOOD.md, UPGRADE.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, MESSAGING.md, DESIGN.md, docs/ site updated.
UPGRADE.md records hash-aware update flow; tests/update.test.ts covers pristine auto-update, conflict, force, dry-run.
Changeset .changeset/world-class-hardening.md staged; DEPLOYMENT.md documents npm Trusted Publishing release and rollback.
